mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals rising household demand and improving revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth does not produce higher 20-day SPX forward returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in unemployment signals improving labor income and lower recession risk, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE falls below its 6-month moving average after being above it for at least 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered unemployment down-crossings are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns no more often than the unconditional base rate, or by lower mean returns than non-triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate remains near zero, expected real rates fall and liquidity remains abundant, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth rises above 3% while FEDFUNDS is below 0.25%
failure_condition: Reject if the joint CPI acceleration and near-zero FEDFUNDS trigger has average 20-day SPX returns below the unconditional sample mean in at least two consecutive walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production trend signals stronger operating leverage and inventory rebuilding, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 6-month up-crossings are followed by negative average 60-day SPX returns or if the triggered hit rate is not above the unconditional positive-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: Weak housing starts below a low absolute threshold signal impaired credit creation and durable-goods demand, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 700 and its 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if low-and-falling HOUST periods produce positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of triggered instances and do not underperform non-triggered periods.

mechanism_narrative: Near-zero policy rates combined with high unemployment identify a policy-support regime in which the Fed is constrained from tightening, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS is below 0.25% and UNRATE is above 8%
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 0.16 and UNRATE was 8.9 in the latest available monthly vintages
failure_condition: Reject if the joint FEDFUNDS-low and UNRATE-high regime has lower 20-day SPX mean returns than periods with FEDFUNDS above 0.25%, after walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion paired with falling unemployment confirms broad labor-market improvement, raising expected aggregate income and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month change is positive and UNRATE 3-month change is negative
failure_condition: Reject if the joint payroll-up and unemployment-down trigger fails to deliver positive 20-day SPX returns more frequently than the unconditional base rate in rolling 3-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production weakness combined with CPI acceleration signals margin pressure and stagflation risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change is negative while CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth exceeds 3%
failure_condition: Reject if triggered INDPRO-weak and CPI-strong observations have nonnegative average 5-day SPX forward returns or a negative-return hit rate below 45%.
